## Type of change

<!-- Select the type that best matches the PR title. PR titles must start with one of these types, for example: `feat: add playbook validation`. -->

* [ ] feat: new functionality
* [ ] fix: bug fix
* [ ] docs: documentation-only change
* [ ] test: tests or fixtures
* [ ] refactor: internal code change without intended behaviour change
* [ ] chore: maintenance or dependency change
* [ ] revert: reverts a previous change
* [ ] ci: CI/CD workflow or automation change
* [ ] build: build system, packaging, dependencies, or release tooling

## Breaking change

<!-- Breaking changes are not a PR title type in this repo. Use `!` in the PR title or explain the change here. -->

* [ ] This PR includes a breaking change
* [ ] This PR does not include a breaking change

If breaking, use a PR title like:

```text
feat!: change playbook schema
```

or:

```text
fix!: change output path behaviour
```

Migration notes:

```text
```

## Safety checklist

<!-- Especially important because this project edits files. -->

* [ ] Plan/dry-run behaviour does not write files
* [ ] Apply/write behaviour only changes the intended files
* [ ] Errors fail safely and are surfaced clearly
* [ ] No unrelated files or behaviours are changed
* [ ] Edge cases have been considered
* [ ] Documentation or examples are updated where needed
